headline: Robinhood Is Down 30% in 2026 While Interactive Brokers Is Up 35%: Here’s Why
summary: The brokerage sector is producing one of the widest divergences of 2026 so far. Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ:HOOD) is down 30% year to date (YTD), while Interactive Brokers Group (NASDAQ:IBKR) is up 36% YTD. That roughly 65-point spread heading into mid-May tells a revealing story about customer mix and revenue durability. HOOD stock closed at $79.05 ... Robinhood Is Down 30% in 2026 While Interactive Brokers Is Up 35%: Here’s Why

headline: Robinhood Faces Cheaper Crypto Rival As Retail Venture Fund Expands Access
summary: Morgan Stanley’s E*Trade has launched direct crypto trading with lower transaction fees, challenging Robinhood’s crypto business. Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) has introduced a retail-focused venture fund that allows non-accredited investors to access private tech companies, including OpenAI and Stripe. Robinhood built its brand on commission free trading for stocks, options, and crypto, and crypto trading has been a key part of its story with retail investors. The move by Morgan...
